alt: Wandering albatross soaring over the vast open waters of the Southern Ocean
caption: They are true pelagic wanderers, spending years at a time flying across the open expanses of the Southern Ocean.
acquisitionNotes: High-resolution dynamic flight shot over open pelagic habitat. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/c4/Diomedea_exulans_in_flight_-_SE_Tasmania.jpg
